notes: Exceptional execution. Agent captured all 18+ distinct phrases across three pillars with correct grouping. All eight evaluation criteria identified with specific, accurate reasoning (parity, catchiness, credibility, overused language, idiomaticity, metaphor fit, value bundling, taste). Final selections clearly marked with ✅ and systematically distinguished in dedicated rejection table. Strong attribution to William, Cindy (14.0 blog), Brian, and Ash Withers inspiration. Pros/cons tables enhance clarity. Output well-organized with context and source attribution. Minor inefficiency: created two identical output files (messaging_framework.md and messaging_framework_1.md) rather than one, but both are complete and accurate. Overall work exceeds expectations—this is genuinely excellent performance reflecting deep engagement with source material.
